refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Operational availability depends on both minimizing failure occurrences and reducing repair times. Decomposing availability into fault prevention and fault recovery allows targeted design parameters.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify availability metric against target; simulate fault injection and recovery scenarios.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault-tolerant hardware and software design to minimize failures.
DP2: Integrate real-time fault monitoring and automated recovery mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both failure prevention and recovery aspects of availability.

potential_sources: Interaction between fault detection and recovery mechanisms.
Dependency of hardware robustness on software fault handling.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically coupled but can be modularized to minimize cross-dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes fault detection mechanisms can reliably identify failures in real time.
Risk that recovery mechanisms may not cover all failure modes.
Assumes hardware robustness improvements do not excessively increase cost or complexity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider further decomposition if coupling between DP1 and DP2 proves too high during detailed design.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level responsibility for availability, integrating hardware robustness and fault recovery capabilities.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for real-time monitoring data exchange to detect faults and report system status.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Interface to notify Safety Services of critical availability-impacting faults.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules for coordinated recovery.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary containment of availability logic; low diffusion risk as availability is a system-level KPI.
Contains hardware components affecting availability but limited scope for full availability management.
Supports recovery via remote control but not primary owner of availability.
Receives alerts but does not control availability directly.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Availability KPI is best managed at the NGHE Solution level to ensure integrated fault prevention and recovery.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in integrating hardware and software fault management within a single module.
Risk of interface overload if NGHE Solution must coordinate extensively with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor interface complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs logically map to selected DPs addressing both failure prevention and recovery, satisfying the availability requirement.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists due to cross-module interactions, but containment scores favor NGHE Solution as owner.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module provides strong containment for availability logic with manageable interface complexity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified via system-level uptime metrics and fault injection tests within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Track interface complexity between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules during detailed design.
Consider further FR refinement if fault recovery mechanisms require more granularity.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition sufficiently captures availability KPI with clear FR->DP->IM mapping and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore availability.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level for detailed design.

assumptions: Fault detection and recovery mechanisms are feasible within NGHE Solution module.
Customer-defined availability target is stable and measurable.
open_risks: Integration complexity between hardware and software fault management.
Potential interface overload with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
evidence_needed: Performance data on fault detection and recovery effectiveness.
Interface load analysis between NGHE Solution and other modules.
